Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Capital (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — The Capital is a city within the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Capital is a location where citizens can hire clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Capital is a place Shera lived her entire life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Capital is a location where magicians perform magic for hire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital is a location where pine scent can be found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Capital is the greatest city in the world and is located within the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Capital is a location with a Kanatalia chapter house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Capital is a place where the Emperor would not look out of place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Shera is heading back to a desk job in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Capital is a destination the Captain intends to head for.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital is located in the Heartlands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The air in the Capital is noted for its quality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Capital is located in the northeast of the Aurelian continent.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Capital is a location near Rainworth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Capital is a location where the Independents have fortified a hotel on its outskirts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The Capital is the largest city in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The Capital is a location with streets and traffic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Capital is the location where Shera and Jorin were talking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Capital is mundane.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Capital is a location where wagons are preparing for retreat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Capital has many companies with contracts from the throne or Imperialist Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Capital is undergoing an evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The sun darkened at midday over the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — An entire section of the Capital was gone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Capital is a destination Loreli is desperate to reach.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
